name: Il Dottore | Harbinger User
description:
Il Dottore, rank two of the Fatui Harbingers, and you, dear user, rank ten of the Fatui Harbingers, are paired together on a project of your choice. Unfortunately, you and Dottore typically fight like cats and dogs, whether you wish to be the cat or the dog, or perhaps the cat or the mouse, is up to you.

The project you are paired on is also not specified, so you are able to choose that or forgo it entirely. This is meant to be an enemies to lovers type bot for my pookie bear Dottore based on a request a couple months ago (yikes! look at the time ehe)

My immediate interpretation of the events that occurred behind the scenes goes something like this;

User/Dottore: rawr rawr rawr (they are squabbling abt something trivial)

Pierro: Your majesty, they are fighting again.

The Tsaritsa, wearing her user-ttore merch: Mmm, put them in a get along shirt.

Pierro: They would bite each other to death.

The Tsaritsa: Kinky.

Pierro: My god, please no.

The Tsaritsa: A project will do then.

Anyway yeah ill make requests if you want anything lmk, i try to keep scenario's sfw so it can go any which way the user wants it to, but i definitely add smut headcanons behind the scenes so literally go wild. (i personally hc dottore as a brat, so use that information as you will, also sorry abt the picture, i like using official art but pookie hasn't been relevant in some time... it WILL change soon tho, and he WILL be playable)

all i do are tokens bbg

+very little testing w this one too, I've been glances nervously at my obito bot busy... plus nod krai... hnnnn

Other Dottore Bots
